description: Same parent-teacher conference with reminder vs original - should match

content_parts.text:
You are comparing calendar events to detect duplicates.

**New Event:**
- Title: Parent-Teacher Conference
- Start: 2026-05-12T15:30:00
- End: 2026-05-12T16:00:00
- Location: Room 204, Lincoln Elementary
- Description: Reminder: Conference with Mrs. Johnson tomorrow at 3:30pm to discuss Jake's progress.

**Existing Events (same date):**

1. Event ID: event-001
   - Title: Conference - Mrs. Johnson
   - Start: 2026-05-12T15:30:00
   - End: 2026-05-12T16:00:00
   - Location: Lincoln Elementary, Room 204
   - Description: Parent-teacher conference for Jake

2. Event ID: event-002
   - Title: Pick up dry cleaning
   - Start: 2026-05-12T17:00:00
   - End: 2026-05-12T17:30:00
   - Location: QuickClean
   - Description: Get suits before Friday

**Question:** Is the new event the same as any of the existing events?

Consider events the same if they refer to the same real-world event, even if:
- Wording is slightly different
- One has more details than the other
- Time changed slightly (updates)

Return the matching Event ID (or null if no match) and brief reasoning.

trace.raw_response_text: {"matched_event_id":"event-001","reasoning":"Same real-world appointment: identical start/end times, same location (Room 204, Lincoln Elementary) and same participant (Mrs. Johnson/Jake) and matching descriptions/titles indicating a parent-teacher conference. event-002 is different time and unrelated."}
